Uses of Class
jline.lang.distributions.HyperExp

Packages that use HyperExp
Package
Description
jline.lang.distributions
This package contains statistical distributions used to specify arrival rates, service rates, and item popularities

  • Uses of HyperExp in jline.lang.distributions

    Methods in jline.lang.distributions that return HyperExp
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HyperExp
    HyperExp.fitMeanAndSCV(double mean, double scv)
    Fit distribution with given mean and squared coefficient of variation (SCV=variance/mean^2)
    static HyperExp
    HyperExp.fitMeanAndSCVBalanced(double mean, double scv)
    Fit distribution with given squared coefficient of variation and balanced means i.e., p/mu1 = (1-p)/mu2
